entities.name: Orchestration CLI
entities.context: Command-line interface for managing parallel workers with commands: ready, complete, spawn-cmd, list

entities.name: ready command
entities.context: Shows workers ready to spawn for parallelization; entry point for checking what work can begin

entities.name: complete command
entities.context: Marks workers as done, enabling dependent workers to become ready

entities.name: spawn-cmd command
entities.context: Generates spawn command for a worker with parent context tracking

entities.name: list command
entities.context: Lists all projects in the orchestration system

entities.name: N5/orchestration
entities.context: Directory structure storing project data with plan.json and README.md per project

entities.name: plan.json
entities.context: Stores full project plan with worker status; central state file for orchestration

entities.name: README.md
entities.context: Auto-generated project overview; output artifact of the orchestration system

entities.name: Workers
entities.context: Parallelizable task units that can be spawned; have dependencies and ready states

entities.name: Projects
entities.context: Organizational unit containing workers, stored in N5/orchestration/{project}/

entities.name: LLM-Driven Planning
entities.context: Philosophy that LLM handles plan definition, spawning decisions, and context; script only tracks state

relationships.context: Command provided by the CLI system
